# Technology Stack

## Frontend

| Technology | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| **React 19** | UI framework |
| **TypeScript** | Type-safe development |
| **Vite** | Build tooling and dev server |
| **React Router DOM** | Client-side routing |
| **CSS3** | Component-scoped styling |
| **Vitest** | Unit testing |

---

## API Server

| Technology | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| **Express.js** | REST API framework |
| **JWT (jsonwebtoken)** | Authentication |
| **TypeScript** | Type-safe server code |

---

## Test Automation

| Technology | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| **Playwright Test** | E2E test framework |
| **TypeScript** | Test code language |
| **Page Object Model** | Test architecture pattern |
| **APIRequestContext** | API testing with custom helpers |
| **Playwright expect** | Assertion library |

---

## Reporting

| Technology | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| **HTML Reporter** | Visual test reports |
| **JUnit XML** | CI/CD integration |
| **Custom Dashboard** | Analytics and trends |

---

## Tooling

| Technology | Purpose |
|------------|---------|
| **Biome** | Linting & formatting |
| **dotenv** | Environment management |
| **SQLite (better-sqlite3)** | Test results database |
